title: Lion King composer is suing a comedian for $27 million
author: Gail Sherman
summary:
A few weeks ago, comedian Learnmore Jonasi appeared on the One54 podcast and spent two hours with hosts Akbar Gbajabiamila and Godfrey Daneschmah. They discussed, among other things, famine in Zimbabwe, colonialism, and America's Got Talent. He also absolutely destroyed the hosts by telling them that the opening lines of the Circle of Life from the Lion King meant "Look, there is a lion! — Read the rest
